hierarchy.h1_hero: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white font-['Tajawal']
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-stone-400 font-['Tajawal']

spacing_and_layout.mobile_container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] overflow-hidden flex flex-col relative bg-stone-50 shadow-2xl shadow-stone-900/10 border-x border-stone-200
rtl_rules: Always set dir='rtl' on the root container: <div dir='rtl' className='...'>
Use Flexbox gap (gap-x-4) instead of left/right margins for horizontal spacing to ensure automatic RTL flipping.
Icons pointing forward (like arrows) must be rotated 180 degrees using 'rotate-180' if applicable.

hero_prayer_card.style: relative w-full overflow-hidden rounded-b-[2.5rem] bg-green-900 shadow-lg
hero_prayer_card.content: Contains dynamic background image, heavy green overlay for contrast, current date/Hijri/Location at top, huge next prayer time countdown in center, and active prayer highlighted.

daily_prayer_tracker.layout: flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto pb-4 snap-x hide-scrollbar
daily_prayer_tracker.item_style: min-w-[100px] flex-shrink-0 bg-white rounded-3xl p-4 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 border border-stone-100 shadow-sm snap-start

bento_adhkar_grid.morning_evening_style: col-span-2 bg-white rounded-3xl p-5 border border-stone-100 shadow-sm flex justify-between items-center relative overflow-hidden
bento_adhkar_grid.small_card_style: col-span-1 bg-white rounded-3xl p-5 border border-stone-100 shadow-sm flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center gap-3

bottom_navigation.layout: absolute bottom-0 w-full bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-stone-100 px-6 py-4 flex justify-between items-center z-50 rounded-t-3xl shadow-[0_-10px_40px_-15px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]
bottom_navigation.item_active: text-green-900 flex flex-col items-center gap-1 font-bold

images.description: Mosque dome at sunset. Use absolute inset-0 object-cover with a bg-green-900/80 overlay.
Dawn sky abstract. Use as a subtle right-aligned decorative background inside the Morning Adhkar card with opacity-40.
Mosque crescent against blue sky. Use as decorative background for Evening Adhkar card.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the Google Fonts (@import url) into index.css.
Ensure all font-family classes refer to the injected fonts (Tajawal for headings, Cairo for body).

Wrap the main App component return in `<div dir='rtl' className='w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] overflow-hidden flex flex-col relative bg-stone-50 shadow-2xl shadow-stone-900/10 border-x border-stone-200 font-["Cairo"]'>`.
Implement a Bottom Tab Navigation state manager holding 4 views: الصلاة (Home), الأذكار (Adhkar), الإحصائيات (Stats), الإعدادات (Settings).

HOME SCREEN (الصلاة): Build a massive Hero section (hero_prayer_card) using the hero_background image with a dark green gradient overlay (`bg-gradient-to-b from-green-950/90 to-green-900/80`). Show Hijri date, Location, Next Prayer (e.g., الفجر) in huge 'Tajawal' font, and a countdown.

HOME SCREEN (الصلاة): Below the hero, implement a horizontal scroll (flex snap-x) of the 5 daily prayers (Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, Isha). Each card should have a toggleable CheckCircle icon to mark it as prayed.
HOME SCREEN (الصلاة): Below the prayers, add the Adhkar Bento Grid. 'أذكار الصباح' and 'أذكار المساء' as wide cards. 'السبحة' (Tasbih) and 'القرآن' (Quran tracker) as square cards.
STATS SCREEN: Use standard Recharts to show a simple bar chart of prayers completed over the week. Theme it with emerald (#10B981) and amber (#F59E0B).
Maintain high contrast. Do not use 'transparent' text or generic placeholders. Use valid Arabic copy for all mock data.
Do NOT use inline styles for RTL flipping, rely on flexbox natural flow under dir='rtl'.
